def positive_public_api_mutates_argument_in_place_without_signal():
    rule_id = "public_api_mutates_argument_in_place_without_signal"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag public APIs that rewrite caller-owned containers or objects without naming or documentation that makes the mutation obvious."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
